description_long: This is a rustic, cube-shaped wooden stool with a weathered plank texture on all sides, resembling reclaimed barn wood. The top surface features a prominent 'no dogs allowed' sign, adding a quirky urban touch. One side displays a diagonal wooden plank fastened with visible screws, while another side is marked by a red paint splatter, suggesting graffiti or urban wear. A third side has several round holes, possibly mimicking bullet holes or heavy wear, and another side features a bold black 'X' on an orange square, reminiscent of a warning or hazard sign. The overall appearance is rugged and urban, with visual cues of both utility and street art.
description: A cube-shaped rustic wooden stool with urban graffiti, warning signs, and weathered textures.
description_view_0: This side shows a diagonal wooden plank attached with screws on a wood-textured surface, with the 'no dogs allowed' sign visible on the top.
description_view_1: This side features a red paint splatter on the wood texture, with part of the 'no dogs allowed' sign visible on the top.
description_view_2: This side displays several round holes in the wood, resembling bullet holes, with the sign on top partially visible.
description_view_3: This side has a large black 'X' on an orange square and a red paint splatter, with the sign on top partially visible.
